blended.narrative: Lutsen Mountains is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: light freezing rain, highs of 41°F.
